passages.name: Alleyway
passages.content:
<> <><><> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <= 6>> <> <> <> <>

🌆 Dark Alleyway

<>
<>

You find yourself in a dimly lit alleyway in Sunfish City. The city sprawls around you, full of possibilities and dangers. Neon signs flicker in the distance, and the sounds of urban life echo off the grimy walls.

<>

You are homeless. You need to find work, shelter, or a way to change your circumstances.

<>

Where do you want to go?

passages.name: Downtown
passages.content:
<> <><><> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <= 6>> <> <> <> <>

🏙️ Downtown

<>
<>

The bustling heart of Sunfish City stretches out before you. Skyscrapers tower overhead, streets are packed with people rushing to their destinations, and the air buzzes with the energy of urban life. Shop fronts line the sidewalks, and the constant hum of traffic fills the air.

Locations

🏙️
市中心

    
        
    
[/IF]

    
        旗魚城熙熙攘攘的心臟地帶在你面前展開。
摩天大樓高聳入雲，街道上擠滿了匆忙趕往目的地的人群，空氣中充滿都市生活的活力能量。
商店櫥窗排列在人行道旁，不間斷的車流聲響充斥著空氣。

            [GOTO Aquarium]

        旗魚城的主要警察總部與分局。
        [LINK: 進入警察局]
            [GOTO PoliceDepartment]
        
    

    
    
        🏦 旗魚城銀行
        專業銀行服務與帳戶管理。
        [LINK: 進入銀行]

passages.name: Docks
passages.content:
<> <><><> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <= 6>> <> <> <> <>

⚓ Docks

<>
<>

The salty tang of sea air fills your lungs as waves lap against weathered wooden piers. Massive cargo ships loom in the harbor, their hulls rusted and barnacle covered. This is a place of hard labor and harder people.

<> <> <= 10>> <> <> <

passages.name: TrainingCenter
passages.content:
<<nobr>>

/* Criminal Heat-Based Arrest Check */
<<if $jobs && $jobs.includes("Criminal")>>
    <<if !$heat>>
        <<set $heat = 0>>
    <</if>>
    /* Calculate arrest chance: 1% at 0 heat, 90% at 100 heat */
    <<set _arrestChance = 1 + ($heat * 0.89)>>
    <<set _arrestRoll = random(1, 100)>>
    <<if _arrestRoll <= _arrestChance>>
        <<goto "CaughtByPolice">>
    <</if>>
<</if>>

<<set $lastLocation = "TrainingCenter">>

<!-- Track location visit -->
<<if !$visitedLocations>><<set $visitedLocations = []>><</if>>
<<if !$visitedLocations.includes("TrainingCenter")>>
    <<run $visitedLocations.push("TrainingCenter")>>
<</if>>

<!-- Initialize training count for today -->
<<if !$trainingCount>>
    <<set $trainingCount = 0>>
    <<set $lastTrainingDay = $dayNumber>>
<</if>>

<!-- Reset counter if it's a new day -->
<<if $lastTrainingDay !== $dayNumber>>
    <<set $trainingCount = 0>>
    <<set $lastTrainingDay = $dayNumber>>
<</if>>

<!-- ===== SKILL TREE: Get bonuses ===== -->
<<set _trainingReduction = setup.skillTree.getEffect("trainingReduction")>>
<<set _statTrainingDiscount = setup.skillTree.getEffect("statTrainingDiscount")>>

<!-- Calculate actual stat training cost -->
<<set _baseStatCost = 25>>
<<set _statTrainingCost = Math.max(5, _baseStatCost - _statTrainingDiscount)>>

<!-- Initialize skill training progress -->
<<if !$skillTrainingProgress>>
    <<set $skillTrainingProgress = {
        "Math Skills": {current: 0, required: 5, timesLearned: 0},
        "Coding": {current: 0, required: 5, timesLearned: 0},
        "Makeup": {current: 0, required: 5, timesLearned: 0},
        "Cooking": {current: 0, required: 5, timesLearned: 0},
        "Cleaning": {current: 0, required: 5, timesLearned: 0},
        "First Aid": {current: 0, required: 5, timesLearned: 0},
        "Painting": {current: 0, required: 5, timesLearned: 0}
    }>>
<</if>>

<!-- Check Quick Learner and Skill Tree bonus every time player enters -->
<<for _skillName, _skillData range $

passages.name: GymTrainingResult
passages.content:
<> <>

💪 Training Complete!

✅ Workout Session Complete

You've finished your training

<= 100>>

🏆 LEGENDARY PHYSIQUE

You've achieved the pinnacle of human strength. Your body is a perfect sculpture of muscle and power. Other gym-goers stop their workouts just to watch you in awe. The weights you lift seem impossibly heavy to everyone else, yet you handle them with casual ease. You've transcended ordinary fitness - you're a living legend.

<= 71>>

💪 ELITE ATHLETE

You crush your workout with incredible intensity. The heavy weights that once seemed impossible now feel manageable. Your form is impeccable, every rep controlled and powerful. Other gym members frequently ask you for advice, recognizing your expertise. Your body has transformed into a powerhouse of muscle and definition. You're approaching the limits of natural human strength.

<= 51>>

🔥 ADVANCED LIFTER
passages.content_zh:
💪 訓練完成！

    ✅ 訓練課程完成
    你已結束本次訓練

    [IF $stats.strength >= 100]
        🏆 傳奇體魄
        
            你已達到人類力量的巔峰。你的身體是肌肉與力量的完美雕塑。其他健身者停下訓練，只為敬畏地注視著你。你舉起的重量對他人來說似乎重得不可思議，你卻能輕鬆駕馭。你已超越普通的健體境界——你是一個活生生的傳奇。
        
    [ELSEIF $stats.strength >= 71]
        💪 菁英運動員
        
            你以驚人的強度完成訓練。曾經看似不可能的沉重重量如今已能掌控。你的姿勢無可挑剔，每一次反覆都充滿控制力與力量。其他健身房成員常向你請教，認可你的專業。你的身體已轉變為肌肉分明、充滿力量的體魄。你正接近人類自然力量的極限。
        
    [ELSEIF $stats.strength >= 51]
        🔥 進階訓練者
        
            你完成了一次高強度訓練。重量感覺沉重但尚可應付，你比以往更努力地突破自我。肌肉在令人滿足的費力感中灼燒。你注意到體格顯著變化——更清晰的線條、更厚實的肌肉、更強的力量。人們開始注意到你的轉變。你正成為健身房裡不容小覷的存在。
        
    [ELSEIF $stats.strength >= 21]
        💪 中階成長期
        
            你完成了一次紮實的訓練，感受到肌肉充血的滿足感。隨著身體適應並變得更強壯，訓練動作逐漸變得輕鬆。你開始在鏡中看見真實的改變——手臂更撐得起袖子，肩膀更寬闊。初期的痠痛逐漸消退，取而代之的是能力感與自信。
        
    [ELSE]
        🌱 新手成長期
        
            你完成了訓練計畫，肌肉因不習慣的用力而顫抖。一切感覺沉重且笨拙，但你堅持到底。當你吃力地舉著資深訓練者能輕鬆應付的重量時，汗水從臉上滑落。你的姿勢還需改進，但你正在學習。結束時，你筋疲力盡卻感到自豪——你出現了，並且完成了訓練。在這個階段，這才是最重要的。
        
    [/IF]

    📊 力量進度
    
        
            先前力量值： 
        
        
            ⬆️ +1 力量
        
        
            目前力量值：$stats.strength / $statMaxCaps.strength
        
    

    
        ⏰ 經過時間：1 小時
    

    [LINK: 繼續訓練]
        [GOTO Gym]
    
    
    
    
    [LINK: 離開健身房]
        [GOTO BusinessDistrict]

🕶️ Shady Deal

The old man cackles with glee, his eyes gleaming with malicious amusement. "Hehehehe... I just love watching people squirm! I got connections to some real special folks. They can change you... make you better, make you worse. Who knows?" He grins wickedly. "I just do it for the entertainment, ya know? Watching you deal with the consequences... priceless!"

⚠️ How It Works

  • You will receive: One random positive physical or mental trait (value: 1-20+)
  • You will also receive: One random negative trait (value: -20 to -1)
  • Cost: FREE - The old man just likes the chaos
  • Limit: 3 deals per day
  • Warning: The negative trait could be severe. This is pure gambling.

passages.name: StripClub
passages.content:
<> <> <><><> <> <> <> <>

🪼 Electric Jelly Revue

<>
<>

Bass-heavy music throbs through the air as colorful lights pulse across the stage in hypnotic patterns—purple, pink, electric blue. Dancers move gracefully on gleaming chrome poles while patrons sip drinks and watch from plush velvet booths.

The atmosphere crackles with energy and anticipation. Money flows freely here, and desire hangs thick in the air.

<
passages.content_zh:
[IF !$visitedLocations][/IF]
[IF !$visitedLocations.includes("StripClub")]
    
[/IF]

🪼 電擊水母歌舞秀

[IF $imageSettings.imagesEnabled && $imageSettings.locationImagesEnabled]
    
        
    
[/IF]

    
        低音厚重的音樂震動著空氣，彩色燈光以催眠般的節奏在舞台上脈動——紫色、粉紅、電光藍。舞者們在閃亮的鍍鉻鋼管上優雅地移動，而顧客們則從天鵝絨包廂中啜飲著飲料觀賞。
    
    
        氣氛中充滿了能量與期待。金錢在這裡自由流動，慾望濃厚地懸浮在空氣中。
    

[IF $jobs.includes("Stripper") || $jobs.includes("Bouncer")]

                [LINK: 💪 開始上班]

                [ELSE]
                    天鵝絨繩後方是VIP區——專屬、奢華且頹廢。私人包廂、頂級服務和親密娛樂正等待著會員。
                [/IF]

passages.name: UniversalWorkComplete

<<nobr>>


/* Prevent infinite loop - only process once per work session */
<<if $lastWorkProcessed === true>>
    <<goto $lastLocation || "Home">>
<</if>>
<<set $lastWorkProcessed = true>>

<!-- Achievement for working hourly job -->
<<run setup.achievements.unlock("hourly_job")>>

<!-- Track jobs worked for work_every_job achievement -->
<<if !$jobsWorked>>
    <<set $jobsWorked = []>>
<</if>>
<<if !$jobsWorked.includes($lastWorkJob)>>
    <<run $jobsWorked.push($lastWorkJob)>>
<</if>>

<!-- SAVE CASH TO PREVENT ACCIDENTAL DOUBLE ADDITIONS -->
<<set _savedMoney = $money>>
<<set _savedBankBalance = $bankAccount ? $bankAccount.balance : 
0>>

setup.skillTree.getEffect("hourlyPayBonus") || 0>>

<> <><><> <> <> <> <>

🚿 Master Bathroom

A spa-worthy master bathroom with Italian marble floors, heated towel racks, and ambient lighting. The glass-enclosed rainfall shower and deep jacuzzi tub offer the ultimate in relaxation. Dual vanities with backlit mirrors complete this luxurious retreat.

Bathroom Features

🚿 Rainfall Shower

A massive glass-enclosed shower with rainfall and body spray jets.

🚿 主浴室

    
        一間媲美水療中心的主浴室，鋪設義大利大理石地板，配有加熱毛巾架與情境照明。玻璃帷幕的雨淋式花灑與深型按摩浴缸提供極致的放鬆體驗。配備背光鏡的雙洗手台，完善了這處奢華的避世角落。

passages.content:
<> <><><> <> <> <> <>

🛒 Fresh Catch Grocery

<>
<>

The main grocery store serving Sunfish City. Fluorescent lights illuminate aisles of fresh produce, packaged goods, and everyday essentials. Shopping carts rattle across the polished floors as customers browse the selections.

💵 Your Balance: $<>

🥬 Buy Ingredients

<> <= _ingredient.price>> <>

[IF !$visitedLocations][/IF]
[IF !$visitedLocations.includes("GroceryStore")]

🛒 鮮捕雜貨店

[IF $imageSettings.imagesEnabled && $imageSettings.locationImagesEnabled]

    

[/IF]

    這家是服務旗魚城的主要雜貨店。日光燈照亮了一排排新鮮農產品、包裝食品和日常必需品。購物車在光潔的地板上嘎嘎作響，顧客們瀏覽著商品。

🥬 購買食材

passages.name: Aquarium
passages.content:
<> <><><> <> <> <> <>

🐠 Sunfish City Aquarium

The aquarium's grand entrance hall opens into a world of blue. Massive glass tanks stretch from floor to ceiling, filled with... sunfish. Only sunfish. Exclusively sunfish. Every single tank contains ocean sunfish (Mola mola) in various sizes, all drifting lazily and rotating in that vacant way they do. You expected dolphins, sharks, tropical fish, coral reefs... but no. Just hundreds upon hundreds of sunfish. The plaques on each tank read things like "Sunfish Exhibit A", "Sunfish Exhibit B", and "Really Big Sunfish Exhibit". Why would anyone build an entire aquarium dedicated solely to sunfish? It doesn't make any sense. The gentle sound of bubbling water and the blank stares of countless sunfish create an unsettling atmosphere.

What do you want to do?

🌊 Explore Exhibits

Wander through the various sunfish exhibits. There are baby sunfish, adult sunfish, and really bi
passages.content_zh:
[IF !$visitedLocations][/IF]
[IF !$visitedLocations.includes("Aquarium")]

[/IF]

🐠 旗魚城水族館

水族館宏偉的入口大廳通向一個藍色的世界。巨大的玻璃水缸從地板延伸到天花板，裡面裝滿了……旗魚。只有旗魚。清一色的旗魚。每一個水缸裡都裝著各種尺寸的海洋翻車魚（Mola mola），全都懶洋洋地漂浮著，以牠們那種空洞的方式緩緩旋轉。你期待看到海豚、鯊魚、熱帶魚、珊瑚礁……但沒有。只有成百上千的旗魚。每個水缸上的牌子寫著「旗魚展區 A」、「旗魚展區 B」和「超大旗魚展區」。為什麼會有人建造一座完全只獻給旗魚的水族館？這完全不合邏輯。輕柔的氣泡水聲和無數旗魚空洞的凝視，營造出一種令人不安的氛圍。

你想做什麼？

🌊 探索展區
漫步參觀各種旗魚展覽。有小旗魚、成年旗魚，還有超大旗魚。就這樣。全部就這些。
[LINK: Explore]

[IF _sunfishRoll]
🌊 探索展區

你漫步在光線昏暗的走廊，經過一個又一個裝著緩緩旋轉旗魚的水缸。牠們空洞的眼睛跟著你——或者也許沒有，很難判斷。

旗魚平靜地漂浮著，牠們巨大的圓盤狀身軀在水中緩緩旋轉。這其實相當令人著迷。

[IF _gotSunfishTrait]
✨ 超稀有！ ✨
你感到與旗魚有一種奇特的連結……你已與翻車魚合而為一！
獲得特質：旗魚
[/IF]

當你繼續往前走時，你發誓眼角餘光看到有人在跟蹤你。每次你轉身查看，那裡都沒有人……除了地板上可疑的一灘水漬，以及通往轉角的水跡。

那些濕腳印看起來形狀怪異地像圓盤。

[LINK: Continue]
[GOTO Aquarium]
[/IF]

✋ 觸摸池
互動式觸摸池，裡面有小旗魚。摸起來滑溜溜的，而且一臉困惑。為什麼這是唯一的互動展覽？
[LINK: Visit Touch Tank]

[IF _sunfishRoll]
✋ 觸摸池體驗

你走近淺淺的觸摸池，急於感受旗魚的質感。幾隻小旗魚懶洋洋地漂浮在水面附近。

你把手伸向其中一隻……牠瞬間消失了。不是游走——是消失。你眨了眨眼，試著觸摸另一隻旗魚。同樣的事情發生了。

[IF _gotSunfishTrait]
✨ 超稀有！ ✨
當你的手觸碰到水時，你感到一種深刻的轉變……你已與翻車魚合而為一！
獲得特質：旗魚
[/IF]

每一隻你想觸摸的旗魚，都在你的手接近的瞬間消失。

你完全不知道發生了什麼事。這個地方令人深感不安。

[LINK: Back Away Slowly]
[GOTO Aquarium]
[/IF]

🎁 禮品店
瀏覽旗魚主題紀念品。旗魚絨毛玩偶、旗魚鑰匙圈、旗魚 T 恤、旗魚馬克杯、什麼都是旗魚……
[LINK: Browse Shop]
[GOTO AquariumGiftShop]

☕ 海景咖啡廳
在能看見主水缸的景觀下吃點東西。一邊用餐一邊觀看旗魚緩緩旋轉。這很催眠，也極度詭異。
[LINK: Visit Cafe]
[GOTO AquariumCafe]

在場人物

Normal Man
普通員工

[GOTO SunfishFakeInterface]

[LINK: ← 返回市中心]
[GOTO Downtown]

passages.name: AquariumCafe
passages.content:
<> <><><> <> <> <>

☕ Aquarium Café

The café is eerily quiet. A few empty tables sit scattered around the room. The lighting is dim, casting strange shadows on the walls.

<>

Something Changes...

You consume the mysterious substance. The taste is indescribable - neither pleasant nor unpleasant, existing somehow outside normal sensory experience. It slides down your throat with an odd, gelatinous texture.

For a moment, everything goes silent. Then you feel it - a fundamental shift deep within you. Your connection to sunfish becomes... profound. Innate. As if you've always been part of their world.

✓ You have gained the Sunfish skill!

<> <>
passages.content_zh:
[IF !$visitedLocations][/IF]
[IF !$visitedLocations.includes("AquariumCafe")]
    
[/IF]

☕ 水族咖啡館

    
        咖啡館裡異常安靜。幾張空桌零散地分布在房間各處。燈光昏暗，在牆上投下詭異的陰影。
    

[IF $justAteSunfishFood]
    
        某些事物正在改變...
        
            你吞下了那神秘物質。它的味道難以形容——既不美味也不難吃，彷彿存在於正常感官體驗之外。它以一種古怪、凝膠般的質感滑下你的喉嚨。
        
        
            有那麼一瞬間，萬籟俱寂。然後你感覺到了——一種深植於你內在的根本性轉變。你與翻車魚的連結變得……深邃。與生俱來。彷彿你一直都是牠們世界的一部分。
        
        
            ✓ 你已獲得「翻車魚」技能！
        
    
    
[/IF]

    牆上
    
        
            安全可食
        
        
            
                🐟
            
        
        
            那翻車魚的圖像似乎在注視著你。無論你站在哪裡，牠的眼睛都跟隨著你的動作。這讓你毛骨悚然。
        
    

    櫃檯
    
        正常男子站在櫃檯後面。又一次。同樣濕漉漉的風衣。同樣不對稱、一眨不眨的眼睛。水持續滴落在他腳下的地板，形成一小灘水窪。你再次聽到風衣內部傳來那些濕黏的拍打聲。
    
    
        他怎麼能不斷出現在每個地方？你開始感到非常不安。
    

[IF $hasSunfishFood && !$skills.includes("Sunfish")]
    
        你持有翻車魚食物？
        
            那道神秘的菜餚擺在你面前。你敢吃下它嗎？
        
        
            [LINK: 吃下翻車魚食物？]
                [IF !$skills][/IF]
                
                
                
                [GOTO AquariumCafe]
            
        
    
[ELSE]
    
    菜單

    
        
        
            🍽️ 翻車魚食物？
            [IF $skills.includes("Sunfish")]
                
                    你已經吃過這道神秘菜餚了。它的效果在你體內流動。
                
            [ELSE]
                
                    一道神秘的菜餚。你不太能分辨它是什麼。它被罩在玻璃罩下，放在櫃檯上，看起來……很古怪。質感奇特。顏色更為詭異。
                
                
                    這是給翻車魚吃的食物？還是用翻車魚做的食物？或者完全是別的東西？你不確定自己是否想知道答案。
                
                
                    $1,000,000
                
                
                    這世上怎麼會有人願意花這麼多錢買……這不管什麼東西？
                
                [IF $money >= 1000000]
                    [LINK: 購買翻車魚食物？]
                        
                        
                        
                        [GOTO AquariumCafe]
                    
                [ELSE]
                    無法負擔（謝天謝地？）
                [/IF]
            [/IF]

passages.name: AquariumSuspiciousMan
passages.content:
<>

❓ Information Desk

You approach the information desk. The figure standing behind it is... wrong. They're impossibly tall and disc-shaped, wearing a soaking wet trench coat that's clearly too small. Their "face" is just two bulging eyes staring in slightly different directions. They're not moving like a human should - instead, they're sort of... wobbling? Rotating? There's a constant stream of water dripping from the coat onto the floor, forming a substantial puddle. You can hear a faint "bloop bloop" sound coming from somewhere within the coat. This absolutely doesn't make sense. It's as if multiple mola mola sunfish somehow stacked themselves inside a trench coat and are pretending to be a person, which is impossible because fish can't do that.

The "person" slowly rotates to face you, making a sloshing sound. Their mouth opens slightly.

"Bloop bloop. Nothing to see here. Bloop bloop."

They continue staring at you with those vacant, fishy eyes. A small fin briefly pokes out from under the trench coat before quickly retracting. You're not sure what you expecte
passages.content_zh:
❓ 服務台

    
        你走向服務台。站在後面的那個身影……很不對勁。他高得離奇，身形如圓盤，穿著一件顯然太小的濕透風衣。他的「臉」只是兩隻凸出的眼睛，盯著略微不同的方向。他的動作不像人類該有的樣子——反而有點……搖晃？旋轉？不斷有水從風衣滴落到地板，形成一大灘水漬。你能聽到風衣內部某處傳來微弱的「噗嚕噗嚕」聲。這完全不合邏輯。就好像好幾隻翻車魚（Mola mola）不知怎地疊在風衣裡假裝成人，但這不可能，因為魚做不到這種事。
    

    
        那個「人」緩緩轉向你，發出晃動的水聲。他的嘴微微張開。
    
    
    
        
            「噗嚕噗嚕。這裡沒什麼好看的。噗嚕噗嚕。」
        
    
    
    
        他繼續用那雙空洞、魚一般的眼睛盯著你。一片小鰭短暫地從風衣下探出，又迅速縮回。你不確定自己原本期待什麼。
    

    [LINK: ← 返回水族館]
        
        [GOTO Aquarium]

passages.name: NormalManTrade
passages.content:
<>

🐠 Trade with Normal Man

"Bloop bloop. Nothing to see here. Bloop bloop."

Normal Man stares at you with vacant, unblinking eyes. Water drips from somewhere within the trench coat. You hear a faint sloshing sound. A fin briefly pokes out before disappearing again. This is deeply uncomfortable.

<← Back to Aquarium
">> <> <>
<>
passages.content_zh:
🐠 與正常人交易

    
        "噗嚕噗嚕。這裡沒什麼好看的。噗嚕噗嚕。"
    

    
        正常人用空洞、不眨眼的凝視盯著你。水從風衣內的某處滴落。你聽到微弱的晃動聲。一片魚鰭短暫探出後又消失。這令人極度不適。
    

    [LINK: ← 返回水族館]
        [GOTO Aquarium]

passages.name: NormalManTalk
passages.content:
<>

💬 Talk to Normal Man

You attempt to strike up a conversation with Normal Man.

Normal Man who is Normal stares at you. His bulging eyes don't blink. They don't move. One eye seems to be looking at you. The other is looking at something behind you. Or maybe at nothing. The silence stretches on. Water continues to drip. You hear a wet slapping sound from inside the coat. The stare continues. It's making you very uncomfortable.

You give up at any attempt to talk to the... Normal Man...

<← Back to Aquarium
">> <> <>
<>
passages.content_zh:
💬 與正常人交談

    
        你試圖與正常人開啟對話。
    

    
        身為正常人的正常人盯著你。他凸出的眼睛不眨。也不轉動。一隻眼睛似乎在看著你。另一隻則看著你身後的某物。或者可能什麼也沒看。沉默持續蔓延。水繼續滴落。你聽到風衣內傳來濕黏的拍打聲。凝視仍在繼續。這讓你非常不舒服。
    
    
    
        你放棄了與這位……正常人……交談的任何嘗試。
    

    [LINK: ← 返回水族館]
        [GOTO Aquarium]

passages.name: AquariumGiftShop
passages.content:
<> <><><> <> <> <>

🎁 Aquarium Gift Shop

The gift shop is packed wall-to-wall with sunfish merchandise. Plush sunfish in every size. Sunfish keychains. Sunfish t-shirts. Sunfish coffee mugs. Sunfish everything. It's almost overwhelming.

✨ Premium Display ✨

Jeweled Sunfish Statue

A magnificent sunfish carved from rare blue stone and encrusted with precious gems. Its eyes seem to follow you around the room. The craftsmanship is extraordinary - almost unnatural in its detail.

Price: $500,000

passages.name: FenRisTrainingSession
passages.content:
<>

Training Complete!

<>

The next four hours are intense. Fen Ris pushes you through a grueling combination of strength training, cardio, flexibility work, and mental conditioning. Her yellow eyes watch your every move, correcting your form with a sharp but not unkind word. Her clawed hands demonstrate proper technique with surprising grace.

"Good," she says simply when you finish, her tail swishing approvingly. "You actually put in the work. That's what I like to see." There's no excessive praise, just honest acknowledgment of your effort.

Despite the exhaustion, you feel stronger, more agile, and strangely more confident. Even your mind feels sharper from the mental focus required to keep up with her demanding routine.

<>

<<= $trainedWith>> guides you through a <<= $trainingEffectiveness>>% effective training session. While competent, you can't help but notice the difference from when Fen Ris was in charge.

<>

Your Gains:

■
passages.content_zh:
訓練完成！

    [IF $trainedWith === "Fen Ris"]
        
            接下來的四個小時非常激烈。芬·里斯讓你經歷了嚴酷的綜合訓練，包括力量訓練、有氧運動、柔韌性訓練和心理調節。她黃色的眼睛注視著你的一舉一動，用尖銳但不失善意的話語糾正你的姿勢。她帶爪的雙手以驚人的優雅示範著正確的技巧。
        
        
            當你完成時，她簡單地說：「不錯。」她的尾巴贊同地擺動著。「你確實投入了努力。這正是我想看到的。」沒有過度的讚美，只有對你努力的真誠認可。
        
        
            儘管筋疲力盡，你感覺自己更強壯、更敏捷，而且奇怪地更有自信了。甚至你的頭腦也因為需要集中精神跟上她高要求的訓練流程而感覺更敏銳了。
        
    [ELSE]
        
            % 引導你完成了一場效果為 % 的訓練。雖然稱職，但你忍不住注意到這與芬·里斯負責時有所不同。
        
    [/IF]

    min-height: 100vh;
    padding: 20px;
    color: #e0e0e0;
}

.stream-button {
    display: inline-block;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
    color: white;
    padding: 15px 30px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-weight: bold;
    font-size: 16px;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.stream-button:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 5px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
}

.stream-button.end {
    bac

passages.content:
<<if !$streamingData>>

        totalStreams: 0,
        categoryUnlocked: {
            asmr: true,
            stylingMakeup: false,
            music: false,
            cooking: false,
            gaming: false
        },
        streamHistory: [],
        currentStream: null
    }>>
<</if>>

<<if !$adultStreamingData>>
    <<set $adultStreamingData = {
        followers: 0,
        totalStreams: 0,
        streamHistory: [],
        currentStream: null
    }>>
<</if>>

<<if !$adultStreamingRegistered>>
    <<set $adultStreamingRegistered = false>>
<</if>>

passages.name: StreamResults
passages.content:
<<nobr>>

<!-- SAVE CASH TO PREVENT ACCIDENTAL ADDITIONS -->
<<set _savedMoney = $money>>

<<set _stream = $streamingData.currentStream>>

<!-- Safety: ensure followers exists -->
<<if typeof $streamingData.followers !== "number">>
    <<set $streamingData.followers = 0>>
<</if>>

<<set _followersBefore = $streamingData.followers>>
<<set _endResults = setup.endStream()>>

<!-- MANUALLY APPLY FOLLOWERS if endStream didn't work -->
<<if $streamingData.followers === _followersBefore && _endResults.newFollowers > 0>>
    <<set $streamingData.followers += _endResults.newFollowers>>
<</if>>

<!-- Apply Crowd's Eye multiplier (2x followers gained) -->
<<if $currentArtifact === "The Crowd's Eye">>
    <<set _bonusFollowers = _endResults.newFollowers>>
    <<set $streamingData.followers += _bonusFollowers>>
    <<set _stream.newFollowers = _endResults.newFollowers * 2>>
<<else>>
    <<set _stream.newFollowers = _endResults.newFollowers>>
<</if>>

<!-- ===== SKILL TREE: Get streaming bonuses ===== -->
<<set _streamingBonus = 0>>
<<set _normalStreamBonus = 0>>
<<if typeof setup.skillTree !== "undefined" && typeof setup.skillTree.getEffect === "function">>
    <<set _streamingBonus = setup.skillTree.getEffect("streamingBonus") || 0>>
    <<set _normalStreamBonus = setup.skillTree.getEffect("normalStreamBonus") || 0>>
<</if>>
<<set _totalStreamingBonus = _streamingBonus + _normalStreamBonus>>

<!-- Calculate base net earnings -->
<<set _baseNetEarnings = $streamingData.lastStream.netEarnings>>

<!-- ===== SKILL TREE: Apply streaming bonuses ===== -->
<<set _skillTreeBonus = 0>>
<<if _totalStreamingBonus > 0>>
    <<set _skillTreeBonus = Math.round(_baseNetEarnings * (_totalStreamingBonus / 100))>>
    <<set _baseNetEarnings = _baseNetEarnings + _skillTreeBonus>>
    <<set $streamingData.lastStream.netEarnings = _baseNetEarnings>>
<</if>>

<!-- Apply Pearl of Abundance bonus (+50%) - AFTER skill tree -->
<<set _pearlActive = $currentArtifact === "The Pearl of Abundance">>
<<set _

<<nobr>>
<<set $lastLocation = "PrawnHubLiveStream">>

<!-- Initialize streaming session if not already started -->
<<if !$currentPrawnStream>>
    <!-- Calculate base viewers -->
    <<set _baseViewers = Math.max(10, Math.floor($prawnhubFollowers * 0.15) + random(5, 20))>>
    
    
    
    <<set $currentPrawnStream = {
        active: true,
        startTime: $gameTime,
        totalMinutes: 0,
        maxMinutes: 480,
        viewers: _baseViewers,
        peakViewers: 0,
        baseEngagement: 45,
        currentEngagement: 45,
        earnings: 0,
        tips: 0,
        currentAction: null,
        actionTimeLeft: 0,
        actionsPerformed: [],
        clothingLayers: 3,
        specialAccessoryActive: false,
        startingFollowers: $prawnhubFollowers
    }>>
    <<set $currentPrawnStream.peakViewers = $currentPrawnStream.viewers>>
<</if>>

<!-- Action is running - advance time by 30 minutes -->
<<if $currentPrawnStream.actionTimeLeft > 0>>
    <<set $currentPrawnStream.actionTimeLeft -= 30>>
    <<set $currentPrawnStream.totalMinutes += 30>>
    <<advancetime 30>>
    
    <!-- Calculate earnings for this 30-minute segment -->
    <<set _engagementMultiplier = $currentPrawnStream.currentEngagement / 100>>
    <<set _viewerTips = $currentPrawnStream.viewers * random(0.5, 2.5) * _engagementMultiplier>>
    <<set _playerShare = _viewerTips * 0.70>>
    <<set $currentPrawnStream.earnings += _playerShare>>
    <<set $currentPrawnStream.tips += Math.floor(random(1, 4))>>
    
    <!-- Viewer fluctuation -->
    <<set _viewerChange = random(-3, 8)>>
    
    
    
    <<set $currentPrawnStream.viewers = Math.max(5, $currentPrawnStream.viewers + _viewerChange)>>
    <<if $currentPrawnStream.viewers > $currentPrawnStream.peakViewers>>
        <<set $currentPrawnStream.peakViewers = $currentPrawnStream.viewers>>
    <</if>>
    
    <!-- Reset action if time is up -->
    <<if $currentPrawnStream.actionTimeLeft <= 0>>
        <<set $currentPrawnStream.currentAc

passages.content:
<<nobr>>
<<set $lastLocation = "PrawnHubStreamEnd">>

<!-- ONLY PROCESS STREAM DATA IF WE HAVE AN ACTIVE STREAM -->
<<if $currentPrawnStream !== null>>

    <!-- SAVE CASH TO PREVENT ACCIDENTAL ADDITIONS -->
    <<set _savedMoney = $money>>

    <!-- Track total PrawnHub hours streamed -->
    <<if !$prawnhubTotalMinutesStreamed>>
        <<set $prawnhubTotalMinutesStreamed = 0>>
    <</if>>
    <<set $prawnhubTotalMinutesStreamed += $currentPrawnStream.totalMinutes>>

    <!-- Check for 8 hour PrawnHub stream achievement (480 minutes in one session) -->
    <<if $currentPrawnStream.totalMinutes >= 480>>
        <<run setup.achievements.unlock("prawnhub_8_hours")>>
    <</if>>

    <!-- Track PrawnHub actions for Category Master achievement -->
    <<if !$prawnhubActionsEverPerformed>>
        <<set $prawnhubActionsEverPerformed = []>>
    <</if>>
    <<for _action range $currentPrawnStream.actionsPerformed>>
        <<if !$prawnhubActionsEverPerformed.includes(_action)>>
            <<run $prawnhubActionsEverPerformed.push(_action)>>
        <</if>>
    <</for>>

    <!-- Calculate final stats and STORE IN STORY VARIABLES for persistence -->
    <!-- Apply streaming studio bonus (15%) if applicable -->
    <<set _studioBonus = $streamingFromStudio ? 1.15 : 1.0>>
    <<set _hasStudioBonus = $streamingFromStudio || false>>

    <<set $lastStreamResults = {}>>
    <<set $lastStreamResults.sessionEarnings = Math.floor($currentPrawnStream.earnings * _studioBonus)>>
    <<set $lastStreamResults.avgEngagement = Math.floor($currentPrawnStream.currentEngagement * _studioBonus)>>
    <<set $lastStreamResults.peakViewers = Math.floor($currentPrawnStream.peakViewers * _studioBonus)>>
    <<set $lastStreamResults.actionsPerformed = $currentPrawnStream.actionsPerformed.slice()>>
    <<set $lastStreamResults.actionScores = $currentPrawnStream.actionScores || {}>>
    <<set $lastStreamResults.totalActions = $lastStreamResults.actionsPerformed.length>>
    <<set $lastStreamResults.

<<nobr>>
<<silently>>

<<if !$prawnhubRegistered>>
    <<set $prawnhubRegistered = false>>
<</if>>

<<if !$prawnhubFollowers>>
    <<set $prawnhubFollowers = 0>>
<</if>>

<<if !$prawnhubTotalEarnings>>
    <<set $prawnhubTotalEarnings = 0>>
<</if>>

<<if !$prawnhubSessionsToday>>
    <<set $prawnhubSessionsToday = 0>>
<</if>>

<<if !$prawnhubMaxSessions>>
    <<set $prawnhubMaxSessions = 3>>
<</if>>

<<if !$prawnhubStreamHistory>>
    <<set $prawnhubStreamHistory = []>>
<</if>>

<</silently>>
<</nobr>>

<<script>>
window.savePrawnStream = function() {
    if (!State.variables.currentPrawnStream) return;
    
    var stream = State.variables.currentPrawnStream;
    
    // Calculate followers gained (current followers - starting followers)
    var followersGained = stream.followersGained || 0;
    if (stream.startingFollowers !== undefined) {
        followersGained = (State.variables.prawnhubFollowers || 0) - stream.startingFollowers;
    }
    
    var streamRecord = {
        day: State.variables.dayNumber || 1,
        viewers: stream.peakViewers || stream.viewers || 0,
        engagement: stream.currentEngagement || 0,
        earnings: stream.earnings || 0,
        netEarnings: stream.earnings || 0,
        newFollowers: followersGained,
        duration: stream.totalMinutes || 0,
        actionsPerformed: stream.actionsPerformed || []
    };
    
    State.variables.prawnhubStreamHistory.push(streamRecord);
    State.variables.prawnhubTotalEarnings += (stream.earnings || 0);
    State.variables.prawnhubSessionsToday++;
    
    State.variables.currentPrawnStream = null;
};
<</script>>

🎭 Take The Stage

The moment you step through the curtain, the bass pounds through your chest. Multicolored lights sweep across the stage in hypnotic patterns—purple, pink, electric blue. The pole gleams under the spotlight, beckoning.

Eyes turn toward you from the crowd. Some hungry, some curious, all waiting. The music builds, heavy and sensual. Your skin tingles with anticipation. How will you seduce them tonight?

👤 Private Shows

The VIP section is where the real money gets made. Behind velvet curtains and locked doors, wealthy clients pay premium prices for your exclusive attention. No crowd, no distractions—just you and them.

What they do with that time is up to you... and what you're willing to offer.

Private Shows Today: <> / <>

passages.content_zh:
[IF !$privateShowsToday]
    
    
[/IF]

👤 私人表演

    
        VIP區才是真正賺大錢的地方。在天鵝絨簾幕和上鎖的門後，富有的客戶支付高額費用，只為獲得你專屬的關注。沒有群眾，沒有干擾——只有你和他們。
    
    
        他們如何利用這段時間取決於你……以及你願意提供什麼。
    

    
        今日私人表演場次：$privateShowsToday / $maxPrivateShowsPerDay
    
    [IF !_canTakeShow]
        
            你已達到每日上限。你的身體需要休息。
        
    [/IF]

[IF _canTakeShow]
    💎 可接表演類型
    
        
        
        
            
            💋 膝上豔舞
            
                在他們腿上磨蹭，雙手撫過自己的身體，讓他們感受你散發的熱度。親密接觸，不可觸碰（除非你允許）。
            
            
                
                    💰 基本報酬：$50-150
                
                
                    📊 需求：魅力 35，靈巧 30
                
                
                    ⏱️ 時長：15分鐘
                
            
            [LINK: 💕 接受要求]
                
                [GOTO StripClubPrivateShowPerform]
            
        

        
        
            
            ✨ 親密共舞
            
                貼身共舞，軀體幾乎相觸。眼神交會、低聲細語、性感動作。比起表演，更注重情感連結。舞者與客戶之間的界線逐漸模糊。
            
            
                
                    💰 基本報酬：$60-175
                
                
                    📊 需求：魅力 35，靈巧 35
                
                
                    ⏱️ 時長：20分鐘
                
            
            [LINK: 💛 接受要求]
                
                [GOTO StripClubPrivateShowPerform]
            
        

        
        
            
            🌹 情慾挑逗
            
                專為他們呈現緩慢而親密的脫衣舞。刻意褪去每件衣物，性感地撫摸自己，讓他們渴望到發疼。純粹的視覺誘惑。
            
            
                
                    💰 基本報酬：$100-250
                
                
                    📊 需求：魅力 55，靈巧 50
                
                
                    ⏱️ 時長：20分鐘
                
            
            [LINK: 🌹 接受要求]
                
                [GOTO StripClubPrivateShowPerform]
            
        

        
        
            
            💫 私人鋼管秀
            
                為他們獻上專屬的特技表演。旋轉、倒掛、地板動作——在僅有一雙眼睛注視的私密環境中，展現你的運動才華。

<!-- Record Action -->

<<run $performance.forceUsed.push($forceLevel)>>

<!-- Get player trait modifier -->
<<set _modifier = setup.getPlayerActionModifier($chosenAction, $suspect)>>

<!-- Determine Suspect Response based on action and their characteristics -->
<<set _reaction = "">>
<<set _escalation = 0>>

<<if $chosenAction === "Verbal Warning">>
    <!-- Only works for low-tier crimes -->
    <<if $crimeTier >= 3>>
        <<set $suspect.currentState = "attacking">>
        <<set _reaction = "Your shouted warning is met with immediate violence! ">>
        <<if $suspect.hasWeapon>>
            <<set _weapon = $crimeDesc.weapon[Math.floor(Math.random() * $crimeDesc.weapon.length)]>>
            <<set _reaction += "The suspect turns on you with their " + _weapon + "! This situation just became life-threatening!">>
        <<else>>
            <<set _reaction += "The suspect charges at you aggressively!">>
        <</if>>
        <<set $performance.appropriateness -= 40>>
        <<run $performance.warnings.push("Verbal warning ineffective for Tier 3+ threat - endangered officer safety")>>
    <<else>>
        <<set _baseChance = 50 + _modifier>>
        <<if $suspect.demeanor === "Nervous and sweaty" || $suspect.demeanor === "Scared">>
            <<set _baseChance += 20>>
        <<elseif $suspect.demeanor === "Cool and calm">>
            <<set _baseChance -= 10>>
        <<elseif $suspect.demeanor === "Aggressive">>
            <<set _baseChance -= 30>>
        <</if>>
        
        <<set _compliance = Math.random() * 100>>
        <<if _compliance < _baseChance>>
            <<set $suspect.currentState = "complying">>
            <<set _reaction = "The suspect freezes at your command and raises their hands in surrender.">>
        <<elseif _compliance < _baseChance + 25>>
            <<set $suspect.currentState = "fleeing">>

The Sheriff witnessed you attempting to steal "<>" from the suspect. They're calling for backup right now. You have seconds to decide what to do.

passages.content_zh:
🚨 你被逮到了！

[IF $theftResult.sheriffNearby]
    
        👮 警長在場
        
            警長目睹你試圖從嫌犯身上竊取「$attemptedTrait」。他們正在呼叫支援。你只有幾秒鐘時間決定該怎麼做。
        
    
[ELSE]
    
        ⚠️ 警員正在接近
        
            你試圖從被捕嫌犯身上竊取特質「$attemptedTrait」時被發現了！
        
        
            偵測機率為 %。一名警員看見你的行為，正迅速逼近。
        
        
        
        
        [IF _playerTraits.includes("Clumsy")]
            
                你的笨拙讓你露餡——你在抽取時手忙腳亂。
            
        [ELSEIF _playerTraits.includes("Honest")]
            
                你誠實的舉止讓欺騙行為顯得格外明顯。
            
        [ELSEIF _playerTraits.includes("Nervous")]
            
                你緊張的舉動引起了懷疑。
            
        [ELSEIF _playerTraits.includes("Awkward")]
            
                你的笨拙讓偷竊行為一目了然。
            
        [ELSEIF $context.nearbyOfficers > 0]
            
                由於附近有 $context.nearbyOfficers 名警員[IF $context.nearbyOfficers > 1]s[/IF]，有人注意到了。
            
        [ELSE]
            
                一名目擊者立即舉報了你。
            
        [/IF]
    
[/IF]

    ⚡ 迅速抉擇
    
        你只有一瞬間可以決定。要逃離現場，還是留下來面對後果？
    

    
    
        🏃 逃離現場
        
            逃離現場。這會讓事情變得「非常」糟糕：
        
        
            自動從警隊解職
            成為罪犯
            大幅提高的罰款與懲罰
            發出對你的逮捕令
            交易變得困難許多（罪犯：交易成功率 -20%）
        
        
        [LINK: 🏃 立即逃離]
            [GOTO OfficerCrimeFlee]
        
    
    
    
    
        ⚖️ 面對後果
        
            留下並承擔責任。你仍會被解僱，但懲罰會較輕：
        
        
            立即從警隊解職
            所有竊取的特質被沒收
            選擇：支付罰款、承擔債務，或失去 5 項特質
            無犯罪記錄（若你配合）
        
        
        [LINK: ⚖️ 接受懲罰]
            [GOTO OfficerCrimePunishment]

                    [ELSE]

<<set setup.calculateStripClubBonus = function(requiredStats) {
    var v = State.variables;
    var bonus = 0;
    
    // Calculate stat bonuses with HARSHER penalties (capped at -45 total)
    var statBonuses = setup.calculateStatBonuses();
    var totalStatPenalty = 0;
    
    for (var stat in requiredStats) {
        var effectiveStat = (v.stats[stat] || 0) + (statBonuses[stat] || 0);
        var required = requiredStats[stat];
        
        if (effectiveStat < required) {
            // HARSH PENALTY: -3 per point below requirement
            var deficit = required - effectiveStat;
            totalStatPenalty -= deficit * 3;
        } else if (effectiveStat > required) {
            // BONUS: +1 per point above requirement
            var surplus = effectiveStat - required;
            bonus += surplus * 1;
        }
    }
    
    // Cap the total stat penalty at -45
    if (totalStatPenalty < -45) {
        totalStatPenalty = -45;
    }
    bonus += totalStatPenalty;
    
    // Sexual expertise trait bonuses (NOT Sexually Skilled)
    var sexualTraits = {
        "Exhibitionist": 8,
        "Sensual Lover": 10,
        "Dirty Talker": 6,
        "Roleplay Expert": 8,
        "Sexual Stamina Expert": 7,
        "Oral Expert": 5,
        "Tantric Master": 9,
        "Tit Worship Expert": 6,
        "Titfuck Master": 6
    };
    
    if (v.skills) {
        v.skills.forEach(function(skill) {
            if (sexualTraits[skill]) {
                bonus += sexualTraits[skill];
            }

    }

        trait

            當你沿著海灘行走時，你注意到一個可疑的身影在遠處跟蹤你。那輪廓看起來異常地……凹凸不平？就像好幾隻翻車魚疊在風衣裡，笨拙地在沙灘上搖搖擺擺地走著。
        
        
            你迅速轉身想看清楚些，但當你這麼做時，那裡什麼也沒有，只有一塊半埋在沙裡、形似翻車魚的小石頭。它在陽光下閃爍著不尋常的虹彩光澤。
        
        
            這塊石頭給你的感覺……非比尋常。你要觸摸它嗎？
        
        
        
            [LINK: 觸摸石頭]
                
                
                [GOTO Sunfish Tank]
            
            
            [LINK: 別碰它]
                [GOTO Beach]
            
        
    

[ELSEIF _eventRoll 
        世界變動...
        
            你向前邁出一步，腳下的沙地突然塌陷。但這不是普通的流沙坑——沙子並非下墜，而是扭曲變形。
        
        
            現實像漩渦中的水流般在你周圍彎曲扭轉。海灘、海洋、天空——萬物都向內螺旋，而你正穿過存在本身的層層維度不斷下沉。
        
        
            從未見過的色彩掠過你的眼前。你聽見不應存在的語言在低聲呢喃。時間失去了意義。
        
        
            然後……你落地了。
        
        
        
            [LINK: 繼續……]
                
                [GOTO ArtifactRoom]
            
        
    

[ELSEIF _eventRoll 
        隱藏的奇觀
        
            當你沿著海岸線行走時，你注意到水中有不尋常的東西。就在浪花破碎的前方，你瞥見水面下躍動著鮮豔的色彩——藍色、紫色、橙色和綠色在陽光下翩翩起舞。
        
        
            出於好奇，你涉水深入一些以便看得更清楚。當你意識到自己看見的是什麼時，你屏住了呼吸：一座壯麗的珊瑚礁，充滿生機！熱帶魚群在珊瑚構造間穿梭，你能看見海葵在洋流中輕輕搖曳。
        
        
            你以前怎麼從未發現這個？這片珊瑚礁位於隱蔽的海灣中，水深很淺足以探索，若不仔細尋找很容易錯過。
        
        
            你發現了珊瑚礁！現在你可以從海灘前往該處了。
        
        
        
            [LINK: 返回海灘]
                [GOTO Beach]
            
        
    

[ELSE]
    
        
            你的散步過程中沒有發生任何特別的事。你享受著寧靜的景色與有節奏的海浪聲。
        
    
    
        [LINK: 返回海灘]
            [GOTO Beach]
        
    
[/IF]

passages.name: Sunfish Tank
passages.content:
<> <><><> <> <> <> <> <> <>

🐟 Sunfish Tank

<>

The moment you touch the rock, reality warps around you. You find yourself submerged in crystal-clear water, surrounded by massive sunfish drifting lazily through the blue.

You're in a tank. An aquarium. But something feels... different.

You catch your reflection in the glass wall of the tank. The face staring back at you isn't human anymore.

Large, round eyes. A massive, flat body. Tiny fins that seem too small for your bulk. You've become a sunfish - a real one, swimming among your kind in this impossible place.
passages.content_zh:
[IF !$visitedLocations][/IF]
[IF !$visitedLocations.includes("SunfishTank")]
    
[/IF]

[IF !$skills || !$skills.includes("Sunfish")]
    
[/IF]

🐟 Sunfish Tank

[IF $skills && $skills.includes("Sunfish")]
    
    
        
            在你觸碰岩石的瞬間，現實在你周圍扭曲。你發現自己浸在清澈無比的水中，被巨大的翻車魚包圍，牠們慵懶地在湛藍中漂游。
        
        
            你在一個水槽裡。一個水族箱。但感覺有些……不對勁。
        
    

    
        
            你在水槽的玻璃牆上看見自己的倒影。回望著你的那張臉，已不再是人類。
        
        
            又大又圓的眼睛。巨大扁平的身軀。與你龐大體型相比顯得過於微小的魚鰭。你變成了一條翻車魚——一條真正的翻車魚，在這個不可思議的地方與你的同類一起游動。
        
        
            奇怪的是，你呼吸完全無礙。水感覺很自然，甚至很舒適。這裡就是你現在的歸屬……不是嗎？
        
        
            你要做什麼？
        
    

    
    
        [LINK: 🌊 四處游動]
            [GOTO SunfishTankSwim]
        
    

[ELSE]
    
    
        
            在你觸碰岩石的瞬間，現實在你周圍扭曲。
        
        
            你發現自己浸在水中，被巨大的翻車魚包圍，牠們慵懶地在湛藍的虛空中漂游。
        
    

    
        
            你在一個水槽裡。一個水族箱。玻璃牆向上、向四周延伸，高得不可思議。當你意識到那可怕的事實時，恐慌襲來。
        
        
            你無法呼吸。
        
        
            你的肺部灼燒。你絕望地掙扎，試圖游向水面，但根本沒有水面。翻車魚繼續牠們平和的漂游，對你的掙扎無動於衷。水灌進你的嘴、你的鼻子。黑暗從你視野的邊緣蔓延進來。
        
        
            在窒息的朦朧中，你看到了它——一個身影就站在玻璃外。那個同樣可疑的輪廓。多條翻車魚疊在一件風衣裡，以不可能的方式直立著。它用太多雙眼睛直直地盯著你。
        
        
            那身影沒有動。沒有幫忙。只是……看著。
        
        
            一切陷入黑暗。
        
    

    
        
            你在海灘上驚醒，大口喘氣，咳出海水。太陽炙烤著你的背。沙子黏在你濕透的衣服上。
        
        
            那塊翻車魚形狀的石頭已不見蹤影。這一切都是真的嗎？口中殘留的鹹水味暗示著它是真的。
        
    

    
        [LINK: 起身返回海灘]
            [GOTO Beach]
        
    
[/IF]

passages.name: CoralReef
passages.content:
<> <><><> <> <> <> <>

🐠 Coral Reef

<>
<>

Crystal clear waters reveal a vibrant underwater world. Colorful coral formations create a maze of life, while schools of tropical fish dart between the branches. The gentle current sways sea anemones, and the occasional sea turtle glides past.

Activities

🏊 Explore the Reef

Swim through the coral formations.

<

passages.name: SunfishTankSwim
passages.content:
<> <><><> <> <> <>

🐟 Swimming in the Tank

<> <> <>

You glide through the water with your fellow sunfish, your tiny fins propelling you in lazy circles...

A Familiar Presence

Something catches your eye through the glass. You turn your bulbous sunfish body to look.

There it is - that figure. Multiple sunfish stacked in a trench coat, standing just beyond the tank wall. It's staring directly at you with too many round, unblinking eyes. This close, you can see the trench coat is soaking wet, dripping onto the floor.

The moment you notice it watching, it quickly shuffles out of view and disappears.

<>
passages.content_zh:
[IF !$visitedLocations][/IF]
[IF !$visitedLocations.includes("SunfishTankSwim")]

[/IF]

🐟 在魚缸裡游泳

[IF _encounterRoll 
    
    
    
        
            你和你的翻車魚同伴一起在水中滑行，你微小的鰭推動著你懶洋洋地轉圈……
        
    
    
        熟悉的存在
        
            有東西透過玻璃吸引了你的目光。你轉動你圓滾滾的翻車魚身體看去。
        
        
            就在那裡——那個身影。好幾隻翻車魚疊在一件風衣裡，站在魚缸牆壁外。它正用太多雙圓睜、不眨的眼睛直直盯著你。這麼近的距離，你能看到那件風衣濕透了，水正滴到地板上。
        
        
            就在你注意到它在注視你的那一刻，它迅速拖著腳步移出視線消失了。
        
    
[ELSE]
    
    
        
            你和你的翻車魚同伴一起在水中滑行，你微小的鰭推動著你懶洋洋地轉圈。其他翻車魚並不在意你——你現在是牠們的一份子了。
        
    
    
        
            水裡很平靜，幾乎有種冥想般的氛圍。你可能會習慣這種生活。
        
    
[/IF]

    有些奇怪……
    
        當你游近魚缸底部時，你注意到一些奇怪的東西。那裡有一條隧道——一條黑暗的通道，通往某個地方。其他翻車魚似乎都避開它。
    
    
        你要進入隧道嗎？
    

    [LINK: 進入隧道]
        [GOTO SunfishTankTunnel]
    
    
    [LINK: 繼續游來游去]
        [GOTO SunfishTankSwim]

passages.name: UnderWaterCave
passages.content:
<> <><><> <> <> <> <>

🌊 Underwater Cave

<>

You swim upward through the sloping passage. The water grows lighter, brighter. You can see the surface above!

With a powerful thrust of your tiny fins, you break through the surface and into open air. You gasp, expecting to suffocate again, but instead you can breathe.

You look down at yourself. Your sunfish body is transforming, shifting back to human form. Within moments, you're treading water as yourself again, in an underwater cave with a small air pocket.

You're human once more.

<>
passages.content_zh:
[IF !$visitedLocations][/IF]
[IF !$visitedLocations.includes("UnderwaterCave")]


[/IF]

🌊 水下洞穴
[IF $UnderWaterCaveEntryMethod === "sunfish"]


    你向上游過傾斜的通道。水色漸亮，光線漸明。你能看見上方的水面了！



    你用力擺動小小的鰭，衝破水面進入空氣中。你大口喘氣，預期會再次窒息，但你卻能呼吸了。


    你低頭看向自己。你的翻車魚身體正在轉變，變回人類的形態。片刻之間，你便恢復原形，在一個有著小型氣穴的水下洞穴裡踩水。


    你再次變回人類了。

[ELSE]


    你向礁岩深處潛去，你的游泳技巧引導你穿過珊瑚迷宮。一個黑暗的開口吸引了你的目光——一個隱藏的洞穴入口。



    你游過狹窄的通道，肺部開始灼痛。就在你以為必須折返時，你看到了上方的光——一個氣穴！


    你衝破水面，大口呼吸空氣。你發現了一個隱藏的水下洞穴，裡面有一個可呼吸空氣的小腔室。牆壁閃爍著濕潤的光澤，生物發光的藻類投射出詭異的藍色光芒。


    海浪之下的秘密避難所。

[/IF]

🐟 奇異的牆壁雕刻

    當你的眼睛適應了生物發光的光芒，你注意到洞穴遠處牆壁上有個奇特的東西。古老的石頭上雕刻著一個清晰可辨的翻車魚輪廓——它獨特的圓形身體和高聳的魚鰭，以驚人的細節蝕刻而成。


    鑲嵌在雕刻中央的，是一顆散發著空靈紫光的發光球體。那光芒似乎對你的存在有所反應，當你靠近時，它微微地變亮了。



    [IF _hasForeignLanguage]

        雕刻下方銘刻著古代文字。你的外語知識讓你能夠解讀它：


        「當海洋太陽之子
        攜來深淵之禮，
        觸碰光芒，合而為一——
        隱藏之路便將賜予。」

    [ELSE]

        雕刻下方銘刻著奇異的符號。文字是一種你無法閱讀的古代語言。

    [/IF]



[IF _canOpenPassage]


    當你靠近時，球體的脈動更加強烈。你感到一種奇特的共鳴——你的翻車魚本質和你攜帶的器物，似乎與此地的古老魔法產生了和諧共振。



    [LINK: ✨ 觸碰發光球體]
        [GOTO SunfishSecretPassage]

[ELSEIF _hasSunfishTrait && !_hasAnyArtifact]


    你感覺到與翻車魚雕刻有微弱的聯繫，但似乎缺少了什麼。球體微弱地閃爍著，彷彿在等待更多……

[ELSEIF _hasAnyArtifact && !_hasSunfishTrait]


    你的器物在牆壁附近隨著能量嗡嗡作響，但球體對你沒有反應。或許你與此地缺乏正確的聯繫……

[ELSE]


    球體依舊黯淡且毫無反應。無論這裡蘊藏著何種魔法，它都不認可你。

[/IF]

活動



    🎣 去釣魚
    在洞穴的生物發光水域中釣魚。
    [LINK: 開始釣魚]
        [GOTO FishingUnderwaterCave]



    一股水流輕輕地將你拉向另一條通往開放水域的通道。你可以讓它帶你回到海灘。

[LINK: 返回海灘]
    [GOTO Beach]

passages.name: SunfishSecretPassage
passages.content:
<> <><><> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <= 20 && !_hasSoulTrait>>

✨ The Hidden Sanctuary

As your fingers touch the glowing orb, reality shifts around you. The wall dissolves into a shimmering veil of light, revealing a passage that shouldn't exist.

You step through into a vast underground chamber that defies natural law. Crystalline formations jut from the walls, ceiling, and floor, each one glowing with soft, pulsing light in shades of purple, blue, and gold.

The air here is thick with ancient power. You feel your artifact resonate with the energy of
passages.content_zh:
[IF !$visitedLocations][/IF]
[IF !$visitedLocations.includes("SunfishSecretPassage")]

[/IF]

[IF $metNPCs && $relationships]

    [IF $relationships[_npcName]]

    [/IF]

[/IF]

= 20 &&
!_hasSoulTrait>>

✨ 隱藏聖所

    當你的手指觸碰到發光的水晶球時，現實在你周圍變換。牆壁溶解成一片閃爍的光幕，顯露出一條本不應存在的通道。

    你踏入一個違反自然法則的廣闊地下洞窟。水晶結構從牆壁、天花板和地面突出，每一塊都散發著柔和、脈動的光芒，呈現紫色、藍色和金色。

    這裡的空氣瀰漫著古老的力量。你感到你的神器與此地的能量產生共鳴，你體內的旗魚本質也隨之甦醒，認出了某種原始而熟悉的東西。

    你發現了一處失落於時間之外的地方——一個屬於旗魚的聖所……

    🔮 預見水晶球

    洞窟中央懸浮著一顆巨大的水晶球，內部光芒脈動。當你靠近時，影像開始在其深處盤旋——面孔，熟悉的面孔……

    [IF _metNPCCount > 0]

            水晶球閃現出你在旗魚城遇見過的人們的影像……

            _metNPCCount 個靈魂被水晶球識別

    [ELSE]

            水晶球保持黑暗與靜止。你在這座城市尚未建立足夠的聯繫……

    [/IF]

    [IF _hasSoulTrait]

            ✨ 水晶球認可了你。你的「靈魂」特質與它的光芒和諧共鳴。

    [ELSEIF _canObtainSoul]

            水晶球劇烈脈動。它已見證了你與這個世界足夠多的連結。它向你提供某樣東西……一份你自身具象化的碎片。

            「掌握你的本質。成為完整的你。」

            [LINK: 🌟 掌握你的靈魂]
                [IF !$mentalTraits][/IF]

                [GOTO SoulTraitAcquired]

    [ELSE]

            水晶球微弱地閃爍。你與這個世界的連結仍在形成……你感覺到，你必須至少認識 20 個靈魂，水晶球才會對你產生反應。

            (你已遇見 _metNPCCount / 20 位所需的 NPC)

    [/IF]

    [LINK: 返回洞穴]
        [GOTO UnderWaterCave]

passages.name: SoulTraitAcquired
passages.content:
<>

✨ Soul Awakened

You reach into the orb and grasp... yourself. A piece of your very essence, crystallized and made tangible.

The sensation is indescribable. You feel complete in a way you never knew you were incomplete. A warmth spreads through your chest as the essence merges with your being.

You have acquired the "Soul" trait!

❓ What does the Soul trait do?

Click below to reveal the secrets of the Soul...

<🔓 Reveal Soul Mechanics
">> <
passages.content_zh:
✨ 靈魂覺醒

    你將手伸入水晶球，握住了……你自己。一份你自身本質的碎片，結晶化並變得可觸及。

    那種感覺難以言喻。你感到一種前所未有的完整，彷彿你從未意識到自己曾經殘缺。一股暖流隨著這份本質與你的存在融合，擴散至你的胸膛。

    你已獲得「靈魂」特質！

    ❓ 「靈魂」特質有什麼用？

        點擊下方揭示靈魂的秘密……

        [LINK: 🔓 揭示靈魂機制]

                🌟 靈魂之力

                    「靈魂」特質允許你透過交易系統，永久地與另一個人交換人生。當與 NPC 交易時，將會出現一個隱藏選項，讓你能夠獻出你的靈魂。

                ⚠️ 交換人生的要求：

                    你必須至少有一項屬性達到 50 或更高（自然數值，不含加成）
                    你必須「沒有」以下特質：無技能、不幸、或賭博成癮
                    你必須擁有旗魚特質（將在交換過程中被消耗）
                    該 NPC 必須未受保護，無法被交換人生

                    警告：這是永久性的決定。謹慎選擇你將成為誰。

    [LINK: 返回聖所]
        [GOTO SunfishSecretPassage]

passages.name: SoulSwapConfirm
passages.content:
<> <> <> <> <> <>

🔮 Soul Exchange

You prepare to offer your very Soul to <<= _npcName>>...

⚠️ Final Warning

This action is PERMANENT and IRREVERSIBLE.

If you proceed:

  • Your Soul trait will remain with you
  • Your Sunfish trait will be sacrificed
  • You will permanently become <<= _npcName>>
  • You will gain all of their traits in addition to keeping Soul
  • Your old identity will be gone forever

There is no going back.

passages.name: ArtifactRoom
passages.content:
<> <><><> <> <> <>

✨ Chamber of Artifacts

<>

You land softly on smooth stone, the warping sensation fading away like waking from a dream. The air here feels thick with power.

Looking around, you find yourself in a chamber that shouldn't exist—a secret place torn from reality itself.

<>

You swim upward into the golden passage. The tunnel seems to shift and twist around you, reality bending in impossible ways.

<>

You emerge into a circular chamber. The water here glows with an otherworldly light. Arranged around the room are seven pedestals, each holding a glowing artifact of incredible beauty a
passages.content_zh:
[IF !$visitedLocations][/IF]
[IF !$visitedLocations.includes("ChamberOfArtifacts")]

[/IF]

✨ 聖物廳

[IF $artifactEntryMethod === "pit"]

        你輕柔地落在光滑的石面上，那種空間扭曲的感覺如同從夢中醒來般逐漸消散。這裡的空氣瀰漫著濃厚的能量。

        環顧四周，你發現自己身處一個不應存在的廳堂——一個從現實本身撕裂出來的秘密場所。

[ELSE]

        你向上游入那條金色通道。隧道在你周圍似乎不斷變換扭曲，現實以不可能的方式彎折。

[/IF]

        你進入一個圓形廳堂。這裡的水體散發著異界的光芒。房間周圍排列著七座基座，每座上都放置著一件散發微光、蘊含驚人美感與力量的聖物。

        這些聖物隨著能量脈動，對你發出召喚……

[IF !$skills || !$skills.includes("Sunfish")]

        聖物對你沒有反應。你缺乏認領它們所需的連結。

        唯有身懷旗魚本質者，方能從此地取走聖物。

        [LINK: 空手離開]
            [GOTO Beach]

[ELSE]

    [IF $currentArtifact]

        你已擁有一件聖物

            當前聖物：$currentArtifact

            你可以用它交換另一件，但這麼做將再次消耗你的旗魚本質。

    [ELSE]

            謹慎選擇。取得聖物將消耗你的旗魚本質。

    [/IF]

    七大聖物

        🐟 滑溜鱗片
            一把閃爍著異界虹彩的旗魚鱗片，觸感光滑得不可思議。
            「旗魚無阻地滑過水流。你也將如此滑過後果。」
            效果：無形之手引導你的行動，使偵測近乎不可能
            [IF $currentArtifact === "The Slippery Scales"]
                目前持有
            [ELSE]
                [LINK: 認領此聖物]
                    [GOTO ArtifactClaimed]
            [/IF]

        💖 溫柔巨人之心
            一顆光滑圓潤、散發溫暖與平靜的石頭，如心跳般輕柔脈動。
            「儘管體型龐大，旗魚卻無害且充滿好奇心。你的存在帶來同樣的平和慰藉。」
            效果：他人會發現自己被你所吸引，羈絆的形成速度遠超平常
            [IF $currentArtifact === "The Gentle Giant's Heart"]
                目前持有
            [ELSE]
                [LINK: 認領此聖物]
                    [GOTO ArtifactClaimed]
            [/IF]

        ☀️ 日光浴護符
            一枚形如浮出水面旗魚、被陽光烘暖的垂飾，貼在皮膚上感覺舒適溫暖。
            「旗魚公開享受日光溫暖。擁抱曝光，無須羞恥。」
            效果：你的身體以超自然的速度學習愉悅之術
            [IF $currentArtifact === "The Basking Charm"]
                目前持有
            [ELSE]
                [LINK: 認領此聖物]
                    [GOTO ArtifactClaimed]
            [/IF]

        🪙 漂流者錢幣
            一枚古老錢幣，一面刻有旗魚，另一面是漩渦狀洋流。它在你的手中永不靜止。
            「順流而行。漂向互利之處。」
            效果：談判似乎總對你有利
            [IF $currentArtifact === "The Drifter's Coin"]
                目前持有
            [ELSE]
                [LINK: 認領此聖物]

passages.name: SunfishTankTunnel
passages.content:
<> <><><> <> <> <>

🌑 The Tunnel

You swim into the darkness. The tunnel twists and turns, growing narrower. Just when you think it might close completely, it opens into a chamber.

The chamber splits into multiple passages. Each one beckons with a different quality of light:

← A passage on the left pulses with ancient blue-green light

→ A passage on the right slopes upward into brightness

<>

↑ A third passage above emanates a strange golden glow

<>
<← Swim Left
">> <> <> <
passages.content_zh:
[IF !$visitedLocations][/IF]
[IF !$visitedLocations.includes("SunfishTankTunnel")]

[/IF]

🌑 隧道

    
        你游入黑暗之中。隧道蜿蜒曲折，變得越來越窄。就在你以為它可能會完全閉合時，它卻通向了一個洞室。
    

    
        洞室分岔成多條通道。每一條都透著不同質地的光，向你招手：
    
    
        ← 左側的通道脈動著古老的藍綠色光芒
    
    
        → 右側的通道向上傾斜，通往明亮之處
    
    [IF $sawTrenchCoatSunfish]
        
            ↑ 上方第三條通道散發著奇異的金色光輝
        
    [/IF]

    [LINK: ← 向左游]
        
        [GOTO TheAlter]
    
    
    [LINK: → 向右游]
        [GOTO UnderWaterCave]
    
    
    [IF $sawTrenchCoatSunfish]
        [LINK: ↑ 向上游]
            [GOTO ArtifactRoom]
        
    [/IF]
    
    [LINK: 轉身返回]
        [GOTO SunfishTankSwim]

passages.name: ArtifactClaimed
passages.content:
<> <><><> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <>

✨ Artifact Claimed

As your hand closes around the artifact, you feel the sunfish essence drain from your body. The connection that allowed you to access this place flows out of you and into the artifact, consumed as the price of its power.

You Have Claimed: $currentArtifact

The artifact pulses with life in your hands, now awakened by the essence

[IF !$artifactsObtained][/IF]
[IF !$artifactsObtained.includes($currentArtifact)]

[/IF]

[IF $artifactsObtained.length === 1]

[/IF]

    [IF !$artifactsObtained.includes(_allArtifacts[_i])]
        
    [/IF]

[IF _hasAllArtifacts]

[/IF]

✨ 神器已獲取

    
        當你的手握住神器時，你感到翻車魚的精華從體內流失。那股讓你得以進入此地的連結從你身上流出，注入神器之中，作為其力量的代價被消耗。
    

    你已獲取：$currentArtifact
    
        神器在你手中脈動著生命，如今被你犧牲的精華所喚醒。它的力量像一股暖流般注入你體內，賦予你它的禮物——永恆、無可否認，且由你掌控。
    
    
        你感覺不同了。改變了。神器的祝福如今在你體內流淌。
    

    
        一股水流將你輕輕拉過一條隱藏通道。你還未意識到，就被沖上了海灘，手中緊握著神器，其力量在你體內嗡鳴。
    

    [LINK: 站起身，返回海灘]
        [GOTO Beach]

passages.name: UnderWaterCaveDiscovery
passages.content:
<>

🌊 A Hidden Discovery

<>

Swimming through the reef, your sunfish instincts guide you toward something... a dark opening hidden among the coral.

Your small sunfish body slips easily through the cave entrance. The passage slopes upward, and you can sense an air pocket above.

You've discovered an underwater cave! You can now access it from the Coral Reef.

<>

Your trained swimming skills allow you to explore deeper into the reef. You spot a dark opening—a cave entrance hidden in the coral.

Curious, you swim closer and peer inside. The passage looks navigable, sloping upward toward w
passages.content_zh:
🌊 隱藏的發現

[IF $UnderWaterCaveEntryMethod === "sunfish"]
    
        
            游經珊瑚礁時，你的翻車魚本能引導你朝向某物……一個隱藏在珊瑚中的黑暗開口。
        
    
    
        
            你嬌小的翻車魚身體輕易地滑過了洞穴入口。通道向上傾斜，你能感覺到上方有個氣穴。
        
        
            你發現了一個水下洞穴！現在你可以從珊瑚礁進入此地。
        
    
[ELSE]
    
        
            你訓練有素的游泳技巧讓你得以探索珊瑚礁更深處。你發現了一個黑暗的開口——一個隱藏在珊瑚中的洞穴入口。
        
    
    
        
            出於好奇，你游近並向內窺視。通道看起來可以通行，向上傾斜，可能通向一個氣穴。
        
        
            你發現了一個水下洞穴！現在你可以從珊瑚礁進入此地。
        
    
[/IF]

    [LINK: 返回珊瑚礁]
        [GOTO CoralReef]

passages.name: SellTraitsComplete
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
<<set _npc = $tradingWithNPC>>

<!-- Initialize if needed -->
<<if !$selectedTraitsToSell>>
    <<set $selectedTraitsToSell = []>>
<</if>>

<!-- ===== SKILL TREE: Get bonuses ===== -->
<<set _sellValueBonus = setup.skillTree.getEffect("sellValueBonus")>>
<<set _sellWeeklyBonus = setup.skillTree.getEffect("sellWeeklyBonus")>>
<<set _sellRelationshipBonus = setup.skillTree.getEffect("sellRelationshipBonus")>>

<!-- Calculate total value and cash -->
<<set _totalValue = 0>>
<<set _baseCash = 0>>
<<for _i = 0; _i < $selectedTraitsToSell.length; _i++>>
    <<set _totalValue += $selectedTraitsToSell[_i].value>>
    <<set _baseCash += ($selectedTraitsToSell[_i].value * 3)>>
<</for>>

<!-- ===== SKILL TREE: Apply sell value bonus ===== -->
<<set _bonusMultiplier = 1 + (_sellValueBonus / 100)>>
<<set _totalCash = Math.floor(_baseCash * _bonusMultiplier)>>
<<set _bonusCash = _totalCash - _baseCash>>

<!-- ===== SKILL TREE: Apply weekly bonus if available ===== -->
<<set _weeklyBonusCash = 0>>
<<set _weeklyBonusApplied = false>>
<<if _sellWeeklyBonus > 0 && !$sellWeeklyBonusUsed && $selectedTraitsToSell.length > 0>>
    <<set _weeklyBonusCash = _sellWeeklyBonus * 3>>
    <<set _totalCash += _weeklyBonusCash>>
    <<set $sellWeeklyBonusUsed = true>>
    <<set _weeklyBonusApplied = true>>
<</if>>

<!-- Punk 1.5x cash bonus when selling traits to Roisin -->
<<set _punkBonusApplied = false>>
<<set _punkBonusCash = 0>>
<<if $physicalTraits && $physicalTraits.includes("Punk")>>
    <<set _punkBonusCash = Math.floor(_totalCash * 0.5)>>
    <<set _totalCash = Math.floor(_totalCash * 1.5)>>
    <<set _punkBonusApplied = true>>
<</if>>

<!-- Remove traits from player -->
<<for _i = 0; _i < $selectedTraitsToSell.length; _i++>>
    <<set _trait = $selectedTraitsToSell[_i]>>
    <<if _trait.type === "physical">>
        <<run $physicalTraits.delete(_trait.name)>>
    <<elseif _trait.type === "mental">>
        <<run $mentalTraits.delete(_trait.name)>>
    <<elseif _trait.type ===

<style>
/* Dream State Animations - Optimized for mobile performance */
@keyframes dreamPulse {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 0.85; }
    50% { opacity: 1; }
}

@keyframes dreamFloat {
    0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px); }
    50% { transform: translateY(-8px); }
}

@keyframes dreamFade {
    0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(15px); }
    100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}

.dream-container {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0a0a1a 0%, #1a0a2e 50%, #0a1a2e 100%);
    min-height: 100vh;
    padding: 40px 20px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.dream-container::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    background-image:
        radial-gradient(1px 1px at 20px 30px, rgba(255,255,255,0.7), transparent),
        radial-gradient(1px 1px at 80px 60px, rgba(255,255,255,0.5), transparent),
        radial-gradient(1px 1px at 140px 90px, rgba(255,255,255,0.6), transparent);
    background-repeat: repeat;
    background-size: 180px 120px;
    opacity: 0.6;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.dream-voice {
    color: #7dd3fc;
    font-size: 22px;

    text-shadow: 0 0 15px #7dd3fc;
    font-style: italic;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
}

    max-width: 800px;
    animation: dreamFade 0.8s ease-out;

passages.name: DreamAwakening
passages.content:
<<nobr>>

<style>
@keyframes fadeFromDream {
    0% { 
        background: #0a0a1a;
        opacity: 0;
    }
    30% {
        background: #0a0a1a;
        opacity: 1;
    }
    70% {
        background: #0a0a1a;
        opacity: 1;
    }
    100% { 
        background: #1a1a1a;
        opacity: 1;
    }
}

@keyframes textFadeIn {
    0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
    100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}

@keyframes pulseGlow {
    0%, 100% { text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(125, 211, 252, 0.5); }
    50% { text-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(125, 211, 252, 0.8), 0 0 50px rgba(192, 132, 252, 0.4); }
}

.awakening-container {
    background: #0a0a1a;
    min-height: 100vh;
    padding: 40px 20px;
    animation: fadeFromDream 4s ease-out forwards;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

.awakening-text {
    color: #7dd3fc;
    font-size: 24px;
    text-align: center;
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 2;
    max-width: 700px;
    animation: textFadeIn 2s ease-out;
}

.awakening-text.delayed-1 {
    animation-delay: 1s;
    animation-fill-mode: backwards;
}

.awakening-text.delayed-2 {
    animation-delay: 2.5s;
    animation-fill-mode: backwards;
}

.awakening-text.delayed-3 {
    animation-delay: 4s;
    animation-fill-mode: backwards;
}

.awakening-emphasis {
    color: #c084fc;
    font-weight: bold;
    animation: pulseGlow 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.awakening-divider {
    height: 2px;
    width: 200px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #7dd3fc, transparent);
    margin: 40px 0;
    animation: textFadeIn 2s ease-out;
    animation-delay: 3s;
    animation-fill-mode: backwards;
}

passages.name: RedLightHousing
passages.content:
<> <>

💋 Red Light District Apartments

A run-down apartment building in the heart of the Red Light District. The hallways smell of cheap perfume and cigarette smoke. Flickering neon lights from nearby establishments cast colored shadows through grimy windows. It's not much, but rent is cheap and no one asks questions.

Travel

🔴 Red Light District

Return to the red light district.

<Back to Red Light District
">> <> <>
<> <>

🚪 Knock on a Door

Try knocking on a random apartment door. There's about a 25% chance someone will answer.

passages.content:
<> <>

🏚️ Outskirts Housing

Rundown houses scattered along the outskirts of town. Peeling paint, overgrown yards, and rusted chain-link fences are common sights here. The neighborhood has seen better days, but the residents make do with what they have. Some call it character, others call it neglect.

Travel

🌾 Outskirts

Return to the outskirts area.

passages.content:
<> <>

Penthouse Suite

A luxurious penthouse sitting atop the city's most prestigious apartment building. Floor-to-ceiling windows offer breathtaking panoramic views of Sunfish City. The interior is all marble floors, designer furniture, and expensive artwork. This is where the city's elite call home.

<>

Visiting: <<= $currentHousingVisit>>'s Penthouse

You're in the lap of luxury, visiting an NPC's penthouse.

<Leave
">> <> <> <> <>

The elevator requires a keycard. To visit someone here, you need to have a Best Friend relationship with them.

<Back to Downtown

頂樓豪華公寓

    
        坐落於本市最負盛名的公寓大樓頂層的豪華公寓。落地窗提供令人屏息的旗魚城全景。室內盡是大理石地板、設計師家具與昂貴的藝術品。這裡是城市精英們稱之為家的地方。
    

[IF $currentHousingVisit]

    電梯需要感應卡。若要拜訪此處的住戶，你必須與對方達到「摯友」關係等級。
[/IF]

    [LINK: 返回市中心]
        [GOTO Downtown]

passages.content:

🏢 Business District Apartments

Upscale apartment complex nestled among the corporate towers of the Business District. Modern architecture, keycard security, and a doorman who remembers everyone's name. The residents are mostly young professionals and executives who value convenience and status.

passages.name: BeachMansion
passages.content:
<> <>

Beach Mansion

A stunning beachfront mansion with private beach access. The architecture blends modern luxury with coastal charm. Palm trees line the driveway, and the sound of waves provides a constant, soothing backdrop. This is the kind of home most people only dream about.

<>

Visiting: <<= $currentHousingVisit>>'s Mansion

You're visiting an NPC's luxurious beach mansion.

<Leave
">> <> <> <> <>

The gate is locked and secured. To visit someone here, you need to have a Best Friend relationship with them.

<>
<Back to Beach
">> <> <> <>
passages.content_zh:
海灘豪宅

    
        一座擁有私人海灘通道的驚人海濱豪宅。建築融合了現代奢華與海岸風情。車道兩旁排列著棕櫚樹，海浪聲提供持續而舒緩的背景音。這是多數人只能夢想的家園。
    

[IF $currentHousingVisit]

[ELSE]

[/IF]

        [GOTO Beach]

passages.content:
<> <>

🛏️ Brothel Private Chambers

The back hallway of the brothel leads to the private living quarters where the workers reside. Each room is surprisingly cozy - a small sanctuary away from work. The thick walls ensure privacy, and the furnishings are tasteful despite the nature of the establishment.

passages.content:
<> <><><> <> <> <> <>

🍺 The Angler

<>
<>

A dimly lit dive bar with wooden walls covered in fishing memorabilia and flickering neon beer signs. The smell of stale beer and cigarette smoke hangs heavy in the air. Workers from the docks and construction sites crowd around the worn bar counter after their shifts, swapping stories and complaints.

Travel

🌆 Alleyway

Return to the dark alley.

passages.content:
<> <><><> <> <> <> <>

🏪 Commercial District

<>
<>

A bustling area of commerce and services. Modern office buildings, medical facilities, and various businesses line the clean, well-maintained streets. People in professional attire hurry between appointments while delivery trucks navigate the busy roads.

Locations

🚌 Bus Stop

Public transit hub.

passages.content_zh:
[IF !_npc]
    
        錯誤：未選擇要進行生命交換的NPC。
        [Go Back]
    
[ELSEIF _lifeSwapProtectedNPCs.includes(_npcNameForCheck) && !$debugLifeSwapBypass]
    
        
            生命交換不可用
            無法與進行生命交換。
            此NPC受到保護，無法進行生命交換。
        
        
            [LINK: ← 返回]
                
                [GOTO NPCInteraction]
            
        
    
[ELSE]

    生命交換
    
        將你的整個存在與交換
    

[IF $lifeSwapIsOriginalBody]

    返回原始身體
    
        這是你的原始身體。你可以無需任何代價換回。
    

[ELSE]

    警告
    
        這將完全交換你與的生命。你將變成他們，他們將變成你。
    
    
        你的「旗魚」特質將被消耗以執行此交換。
    

[/IF]

    將被交換的項目：
    
        姓名：你的名字和他們的名字
        屬性：力量、智力、魅力、敏捷
        外貌：髮型、膚色、年齡、體格
        身體部位：性別、胸部、臀部、生殖器
        生理特質：所有生理特質
        心理特質：所有心理特質
        技能：所有技能

passages.name: LifeSwapTransformation
passages.content:
<> <> <> <> <> <>

Life Swap Complete

Your existence has been exchanged with <>

Your Transformation

Mental Shift

A wave of dizziness washes over you as reality begins to blur. Your memories start to feel... distant, like watching someone else's life through frosted glass. The name "<>" echoes in your mind, but it feels foreign now, like a half-forgotten dream.

New memories floo
passages.content_zh:
生命交換完成
    你的存在已與 

    你的轉變

    
    
        心智轉變
        
            一陣暈眩襲來，現實開始模糊。你的記憶開始感覺……遙遠，就像透過霧面玻璃觀看別人的生活。名字「」在你腦中迴盪，但現在感覺很陌生，像個半遺忘的夢境。
        
        
            新的記憶湧入，鮮明而親密。你記得 的生活，彷彿那是你自己的人生……
        

        
            [IF $mentalTraits && $mentalTraits.includes("Bimbo") && $mentalTraits.includes("Flirty")]
                你記得自己是每場派對的靈魂人物，對任何可愛的人眨動睫毛，朋友們則在一旁咯咯笑。男孩、女孩——都無所謂。你會捲著頭髮，傾身靠近，看著他們為你融化。學校只是展示新衣服和收集電話號碼的地方。既然能用噘嘴和一個承諾就讓任何人幫你寫作業，何必費心看書呢？
            [ELSEIF $mentalTraits && $mentalTraits.includes("Bimbo") && $mentalTraits.includes("Submissive")]
                你記得讓別人替你思考的那種極樂的單純。當有更聰明的人可以直接告訴你該做什麼時，何必擔心複雜的事情？你會開心地點頭附和，急於取悅他人，即使不太明白原因，也能在「有用」中找到快樂。漂亮又順從比聰明容易多了。
            [ELSEIF $mentalTraits && $mentalTraits.includes("Bimbo")]
                你記得在鏡子前花上數小時，完善你的妝容，練習噘嘴。複雜的思緒會像雲朵般飄走，被簡單的快樂取代——購物、八卦、看起來火辣。朋友們談論事業和未來時，你卻在思考下次指甲要塗什麼顏色。當你不思考得太用力時，生活就是……比較輕鬆。
            [ELSEIF $mentalTraits && $mentalTraits.includes("Dominant") && $mentalTraits.includes("Cruel")]
                你記得那種令人陶醉的權力快感，看著別人在你的注視下坐立不安。你不只是想要控制——你想要他們為服務你的特權而受苦。眼淚、哀求、破碎的意志……這些都是你的戰利品。弱者生來就是被支配的，而你生來就是要用鐵腕統治他們。
            [ELSEIF $mentalTraits && $mentalTraits.includes("Dominant") && $mentalTraits.includes("Confident")]
                你記得走進房間時，感覺所有人的注意力像磁鐵一樣瞬間集中到你身上。人們自然而然地服從你、尋求你的認可、等待你的命令。領導力不是你學來的——它就是你與生俱來的本質。其他人跟隨你，是因為他們見識到了偉大。
            [ELSEIF $mentalTraits && $mentalTraits.includes("Dominant")]
                你記得負責的感覺，記得別人向你尋求指示的滿足感。在你的社交圈裡，你的話就是法律。人們不與你爭論——他們服從。而那些不服從的人？他們很快就學到教訓。權力不是給你的；是你奪取的，並且用鐵腕牢牢掌握。
            [ELSEIF $mentalTraits && $mentalTraits.includes("Submissive") && $mentalTraits.includes("Perverted")]
                你記得將自己完全交予他人慾望的那種甜蜜的臣服。被使用、只為他人快感而存在的刺激感。界線只是建議，「不要」是很少從你嘴裡說出的字眼。被渴望、被佔有、被擁有——這些是你最深層的渴望。
            [ELSEIF $mentalTraits && $mentalTraits.includes("Submissive") && $mentalTraits.includes("Shy")]
                你記得自己總是隱沒在背景中，當別人替你作決定時心懷感激。開口說話感覺不可能——萬一別人評判你怎麼辦？跟隨、同意、讓更強勢的人主導更安全。隱形是舒適的。被命令是一種解脫。
            [ELSEIF $mentalTra

passages.name: LabTransformationScene
passages.content:
<<nobr>>

<<set $lastLocation = "LabTransformationScene">>

<!-- Store pre-transformation body stats for description variations -->
<<set _preChest = $preTransformChest || $bodyParts.chest || "medium">>
<<set _preButt = $preTransformButt || $bodyParts.butt || "medium">>
<<set _preGenitals = $preTransformGenitals || $bodyParts.genitals || "vagina">>
<<set _preGender = $preTransformGender || "female">>
<<set _preAge = $preTransformAge || $appearance.age || "Adult">>
<<set _transformName = $lastCombineResult.newTrait>>
<<set _transform = setup.fullTransformations[_transformName]>>

<!-- Determine gradient colors based on transformation type -->
<<set _gradientTop = "#0d0015">>
<<set _gradientMid = "#1a0a2e">>
<<set _gradientPeak = "#2d1052">>
<<set _accentColor = "#ff00ff">>
<<set _bannerGradient = "linear-gradient(135deg, #8b00ff 0%, #ff00ff 50%, #8b00ff 100%)">>

<<if _transformName === "Succubus" || _transformName === "Imp" || _transformName === "Hellhound">>
    <!-- Demonic - Deep crimson/hellfire -->
    <<set _gradientTop = "#1a0505">>
    <<set _gradientMid = "#3d0a0a">>
    <<set _gradientPeak = "#6b1515">>
    <<set _accentColor = "#ff3333">>
    <<set _bannerGradient = "linear-gradient(135deg, #8b0000 0%, #ff4444 50%, #8b0000 100%)">>
<<elseif _transformName === "Werecat" || _transformName === "Werewolf" || _transformName === "Werebunny" || _transformName === "Werefox" || _transformName === "Weresheep" || _transformName === "Hucow">>
    <!-- Were-creatures - Earthy brown/amber -->
    <<set _gradientTop = "#0d0805">>
    <<set _gradientMid = "#2a1a0a">>
    <<set _gradientPeak = "#4d3319">>
    <<set _accentColor = "#ffa500">>
    <<set _bannerGradient = "linear-gradient(135deg, #8b4513 0%, #ffa500 50%, #8b4513 100%)">>
<<elseif _transformName === "Trophy Wife" || _transformName === "Gym Bunny" || _transformName === "E-Girl" || _transformName === "Punk" || _transformName === "Gyaru">>
    <!-- Aesthetic - Pink/glamour -->
    <<set _gradientTop = "#1a050d">
